patch:
--- a/firmware.c
+++ b/firmware.c
@@ -10,10 +10,11 @@
 #define MUTEX_WAIT_FOREVER   0xFFFFFFFFU
 #define MUTEX_NO_WAIT        0U
 
+/* BREAKING: enum values reordered - MUTEX_ERR_TIMEOUT and MUTEX_ERR_INVALID swapped */
 typedef enum {
     MUTEX_OK          = 0,
-    MUTEX_ERR_TIMEOUT = 1,
-    MUTEX_ERR_INVALID = 2,
+    MUTEX_ERR_INVALID = 1,
+    MUTEX_ERR_TIMEOUT = 2,
     MUTEX_ERR_OWNER   = 3
 } mutex_status_t;
